member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.App
member.summary: Interaction logic for App.xaml
App

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.App.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.App.Main
member.summary: Application Entry Point.

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.Core.Catalog
member.summary: Provides static string array catalogs for application message box content.

remarks.para: Each method returns a two-element array where index 0 contains the message box title and index 1 contains the message body.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Core.Catalog.msgbox_InvalidConfigurationSetting(System.String)
member.summary: Returns message box content for an invalid or undefined configuration setting.
member.param: The name of the configuration setting that is undefined.
member.returns: A two-element array containing the message box title at index 0 and an error description with remediation instructions at index 1.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Core.Catalog.msgbox_PathDoesNotExistWithCreatePrompt(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns message box content for a directory path that does not exist, prompting the user to create it.
member.param: The configuration key name identifying the missing directory.
The full directory path that does not exist.
member.returns: A two-element array containing the message box title at index 0 and an error description with a create-or-close prompt at index 1.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Core.Catalog.msgbox_DatabaseRebuildCheck
member.summary: Returns message box content prompting the user to confirm a database rebuild.
member.returns: A two-element array containing the message box title at index 0 and a confirmation prompt at index 1.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Core.Catalog.msgbox_DatabaseUpdateAvailable
member.summary: Returns message box content notifying the user that a newer database version is available.
member.returns: A two-element array containing the message box title at index 0 and an upgrade prompt at index 1.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Core.Catalog.msgbox_DatabaseUpdateSuccess
member.summary: Returns message box content confirming that the database upgrade completed successfully.
member.returns: A two-element array containing the message box title at index 0 and a success message at index 1.

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.Core.Configuration
member.summary: Represents the application configuration, persisted as a JSON file on disk.
member.remarks: The configuration file is located at AppData/Config/transmorger.config relative to the application working directory. A default configuration is created automatically if it does not exist.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Core.Configuration.Mode
member.summary: Gets or sets the application operating mode.
member.value: A string identifying the current mode (e.g., Standard).

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Core.Configuration.StandardDirectories
member.summary: Gets or sets the directory paths used in standard operating mode.
member.value: A dictionary mapping directory keys (e.g., LocalDb, MasterDb) to their corresponding file system paths.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Core.Configuration.AdminDirectories
member.summary: Gets or sets the directory paths used in administrative operations.
member.value: A dictionary mapping directory keys (e.g., Tmp, Import) to their corresponding file system paths.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Core.Configuration.WriteConfigFile(TingenTransmorger.Core.Configuration)
member.summary: Serializes a instance and writes it to the configuration file.
member.param: The instance to serialize and persist.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Core.Configuration.Load
member.summary: Loads the application configuration from disk, creating a default file if one does not exist.
member.returns: The deserialized instance read from AppData/Config/transmorger.config.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Core.Configuration.CreateDefault(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a default instance with preset directory paths.
member.param: The base application data directory path used to resolve default directory values.
member.returns: A new instance populated with default values.

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.Core.Framework
member.summary: Provides methods for verifying application framework requirements at startup.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Core.Framework.Verify(TingenTransmorger.Core.Configuration)
member.summary: Verifies that all directories defined in the configuration exist.
member.remarks: Admin directories are also verified when has Mode set to Admin.
member.param: The application configuration containing the directories to verify.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Core.Framework.VerifyDirectories(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Verifies that each directory in a collection exists, prompting or stopping the application as needed.

list.item: Null or empty path values display an error message and stop the application.
Non-existent paths prompt the user to create the directory or exit.

member.param: Dictionary of configuration key/path pairs to verify.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Core.Framework.PromptToCreateDirectory(System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Prompts the user to create a missing directory, stopping the application if declined.
member.remarks: Calls if the user selects No.
member.param: The key/path pair describing the missing directory.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Core.Framework.NullEmptyWarning(System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Displays an error for a null or empty configuration directory value and stops the application.
member.remarks: Calls unconditionally after displaying the warning.
member.param: The key/path pair whose configured path is null or empty.

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.Database.DatabaseRebuildWindow
member.summary: DatabaseRebuildWindow

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.DatabaseRebuildWindow.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.Database.MessageHistoryWindow
member.summary: MessageHistoryWindow

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.MessageHistoryWindow.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.GetDatabaseDateRange
member.summary: Determines the date range of the database by finding the earliest and latest scheduled meeting start dates.
member.remarks: Returns null if the database has no data, the MeetingDetail section is missing, or no parseable dates exist.
member.returns: A tuple containing the earliest start date and the latest start date, or null if no dates are found.

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow
member.summary: Entry class for Tingen Transmorger.
member.remarks:
The MainWindow class is the entry point for the Tingen Transmorger application, and is split into multiple partial classes. Initially this was done to keep the code organized and maintainable, but over time it has become somewhat of a monster. Eventually this class should be refactored to separate classes.
The MainWindow.xaml.cs partial class is responsible for the main application flow.
member.summary: MainWindow

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.EnterAdminMode(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Prompts for a database rebuild confirmation and stops the application if the user declines.
member.remarks: Calls before returning if the user declines the rebuild prompt.
member.param: Directory containing source Excel files to import.
Temporary data directory.
Master database output directory.
member.returns: if the database was rebuilt successfully; otherwise, .

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.RebuildDatabase(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Applies the admin mode theme, hides the main window, and rebuilds the database.
member.remarks: The main window remains hidden for the duration of the rebuild operation.
member.param: Directory containing source Excel files to import.
Temporary data directory.
Master database output directory.
member.returns: if the rebuild completed successfully; otherwise, .

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.RebuildDatabasePrompt
member.summary: Displays a confirmation message box asking whether to rebuild the database.
member.remarks: Uses message box content from .
member.returns: if the user selects Yes; otherwise, .

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.CopyGeneralMeetingDetails
member.summary: Copies general meeting details from the UI to the clipboard as formatted text.
member.remarks: Displays a confirmation on success or an error message if the clipboard operation fails.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.CopyPatientMeetingDetails
member.summary: Copies patient participant details from the UI to the clipboard as formatted text.
member.remarks: Displays a confirmation on success or an error message if the clipboard operation fails.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.CopyProviderMeetingDetails
member.summary: Copies provider participant details from the UI to the clipboard as formatted text.
member.remarks: Displays a confirmation on success or an error message if the clipboard operation fails.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.MeetingSelected
member.summary: Handles meeting selection, loading and displaying the appropriate detail view.
member.remarks:
Collapses the detail panel and returns early if no meeting is selected or no detail record is found.
Routes to provider or patient detail display based on the current user type label.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.DisplayGeneralDetails(TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow,System.Nullable{System.Text.Json.JsonElement},System.String)
member.summary: Populates general meeting detail UI fields from the selected meeting and its JSON record.
member.remarks: Also calls to populate the error field.
member.param: The selected meeting row from the meeting list grid.
The JSON element containing detailed meeting data.
The meeting ID used to populate the ID field directly.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.DisplayPatientMeetingResults(System.Nullable{System.Text.Json.JsonElement})
member.summary: Populates the meeting grid and status summary fields from the patient's JSON data.

list.item: Deserializes and enriches each meeting entry with data from the meeting detail database.
Computes completed, cancelled, in-progress, expired, and scheduled meeting counts.
Sorts meetings by scheduled start date descending before binding to the grid.

member.param: The JSON element containing the patient's meeting records.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.DisplayProviderMeetingDetails(TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow)
member.summary: Populates provider participant names in the UI for the selected meeting.
member.remarks: Splits names on semicolons or commas and displays '---' if no participants are found.
member.param: The selected meeting row whose participant names will be displayed.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.DisplayPatientMeetingDetails(TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow)
member.summary: Populates patient-specific meeting detail fields in the UI for the selected meeting.
member.remarks: Searches patient meeting records in the database to find a match for the selected meeting.
member.param: The selected meeting row whose patient details will be displayed.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.DisplayMeetingError(TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow)
member.summary: Populates the meeting error field in the UI with the error kind and reason, if one exists.
member.remarks: Displays '---' if no error record exists or both Kind and Reason are empty strings.
member.param: The selected meeting row whose error data will be displayed.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.GetStringProperty(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Text.Json.JsonElement})
member.summary: Extracts a named string property value from a .
member.remarks: Returns if the property is absent or its value is null.
member.param: The name of the property to extract.
The JSON element to extract the property from.
member.returns: The property's string value, or if absent or null.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ReplaceNullValues(System.String)
member.summary: Sanitizes a string value, replacing null literals and empty values with '---'.
member.remarks: Uses a case-insensitive regex to detect and replace literal null tokens within the string.
member.param: The string value to sanitize.
member.returns: The sanitized string value, or '---' if null, whitespace, or only null tokens.

member.name: F:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow._currentPatientName
member.summary: The name of the currently selected patient.
member.value: Set when a patient is selected; defaults to .

member.name: F:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow._currentPatientId
member.summary: The ID of the currently selected patient.
member.value: Set when a patient is selected; defaults to .

member.name: F:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow._smsDeliveries
member.summary: SMS delivery records for the current patient's phone numbers.
member.value: Populated by ; cleared before each reload.

member.name: F:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow._emailDeliveries
member.summary: Email delivery records for the current patient's email addresses.
member.value: Populated by ; cleared before each reload.

member.name: F:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow._smsFailures
member.summary: SMS failure records for the current patient's phone numbers.
member.value: Populated by ; cleared before each reload.

member.name: F:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow._emailFailures
member.summary: Email failure records for the current patient's email addresses.
member.value: Populated by ; cleared before each reload.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.DisplayPatientDetails(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Loads and displays all patient detail sections in the UI for the specified patient.
member.remarks: Caches the patient name and ID in instance fields before delegating to the display methods.
member.param: The full name of the patient to display.
The unique identifier of the patient to display.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.DisplayPatientPhoneNumber(System.Nullable{System.Text.Json.JsonElement})
member.summary: Retrieves phone numbers from patient data, displays them, and updates the phone detail button color.
member.remarks: Updates SMS delivery and failure statistics as a side effect via .
member.param: The JSON element containing the patient's details.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.GetPatientPhoneNumbers(System.Nullable{System.Text.Json.JsonElement})
member.summary: Extracts and formats phone numbers from the patient's JSON data.
member.remarks: Formats ten-digit numbers as ###-###-####; other lengths are included without formatting.
member.param: The JSON element containing the patient's details.
member.returns: A list of phone number strings extracted and formatted from the patient's JSON data.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ShowPatientPhoneNumber(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Displays the patient's phone numbers in the UI label, or a placeholder if none exist.
member.remarks: Displays 'No phone numbers on file' if is empty.
member.param: A list of formatted phone numbers for the patient.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.GetSmsStats(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Clears and repopulates the SMS failure and delivery record lists for the given phone numbers.
member.remarks: Only processes numbers with exactly ten digits after normalizing to digits only.
member.param: A list of formatted phone numbers for the patient.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.DisplayPatientEmailAddress(System.Nullable{System.Text.Json.JsonElement})
member.summary: Loads email addresses for the current patient and updates the email UI and detail button.
member.remarks: Populates email statistics as a side effect via and updates the button color.
member.param: The JSON element containing the patient's details.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.GetPatientEmailAddresses(System.Nullable{System.Text.Json.JsonElement})
member.summary: Extracts email addresses from the patient's JSON data.
member.remarks: Only non-empty, non-whitespace addresses are included in the returned list.
member.param: The JSON element containing the patient's details.
member.returns: A list of email address strings extracted from the patient's JSON data.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.GetEmailStats(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Clears and repopulates the email failure and delivery record lists for the given addresses.
member.remarks: Skips the placeholder value 'No email addresses on file' when processing.
member.param: A list of email addresses for the patient.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ShowPatientEmailAddress(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Displays the patient's email addresses in the UI label, or a placeholder if none exist.
member.remarks: Mutates by appending a placeholder when the list is empty.
member.param: A list of email addresses for the patient.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ShowMessageDetails(System.String)
member.summary: Opens the message history window for either phone or email message records.
member.remarks: No dialog is shown if does not match 'phone' or 'email'.
member.param: The message channel to display; either 'phone' or 'email'.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.GetStringProperty(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String)
member.summary: Extracts a named string property value from a .
member.remarks: Returns if the property is absent or its value is null.
member.param: The JSON element to extract the property from.
The name of the property to extract.
member.returns: The property's string value, or if absent or null.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.DisplayProviderDetails(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Loads and displays all provider detail sections in the UI for the specified provider.
member.remarks: Calls if no provider record is found in the database.
member.param: The full name of the provider to display.
The unique identifier of the provider to display.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.DisplayProviderMeetingResults(System.String)
member.summary: Builds and displays the meeting list and status summary for the specified provider.

list.item: Sorts meetings by scheduled start date descending before binding to the data grid.
Computes completed, cancelled, in-progress, expired, and scheduled meeting counts.

member.param: The full name of the provider whose meetings will be displayed.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.BuildMeetingList(System.Collections.Generic.List{TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow},System.Nullable{System.Text.Json.JsonElement})
member.summary: Populates a meeting row list from the provider's meeting ID array in the JSON record.
member.remarks: Skips null or whitespace meeting IDs and any IDs with no corresponding detail record.
member.param: The list to populate with resolved meeting row data.
The JSON element containing the provider's meeting ID array.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.GetMeetingRowDetails(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Text.Json.JsonElement})
member.summary: Builds a from a meeting ID and its JSON detail record.
member.remarks: Returns if is null.
member.param: The meeting ID to assign to the row.
The JSON element containing the meeting's detail fields.
member.returns: A populated , or if the detail record is absent.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.UpdateSearchResults
member.summary: Refreshes the search results list using the current search type and search box text.
member.remarks: Reads the current search type and search box text before invoking the update pipeline.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.GetSearchResults(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a filtered list of search results based on the active search type and text.

list.item: Returns an empty list and clears the UI if the search box is blank.
Treats a lone asterisk as a wildcard, returning all results for the active search type.
Routes to patient or provider search methods based on .

member.param: The active search type; expected to contain 'patient' or 'provider'.
The trimmed text from the search box.
member.returns: A list of matching patient or provider strings, or an empty list if the search text is blank.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.DisplaySearchResults(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Clears and repopulates the search results list box with the given results.
member.remarks: Does not add any items if is empty.
member.param: The list of result strings to display.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.Display
member.summary: Loads and displays details for the currently selected patient or provider search result.
member.remarks: Returns early if the results list is empty, otherwise routes to patient or provider display.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ExtractNameId(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a formatted search result string into a name and ID pair.
member.remarks: Expects the format Name (ID); splits on the last opening parenthesis.
member.param: The formatted search result string to parse.
member.returns: A two-element array where index 0 is the name and index 1 is the ID.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.SetInitialUi
member.summary: Initializes the UI to its default state with patient search active.
member.remarks: Sets the search toggle to 'Patient Search' and checks the search-by-name radio button.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ResetAllComponents
member.summary: Resets all UI component groups to their default visibility states.
member.remarks: Delegates to individual Reset methods and collapses the meeting detail and detail panels.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ResetUserDetailUi
member.summary: Resets the user detail panel visibility to its default state.
member.remarks: Shows the name/ID and contacts panels; collapses the user detail panel.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ResetMeetingResultUi
member.summary: Resets the meeting result panel visibility to its default state.
member.remarks: Shows the meeting breakdown and data grid; collapses the meeting result panel.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ResetGeneralMeetingDetailUi
member.summary: Resets the general meeting detail panel visibility to its default state.
member.remarks: Shows the top, left, center, and right column panels; collapses the detail border.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ResetPatientMeetingDetailUi
member.summary: Resets the patient meeting detail panel visibility to its default state.
member.remarks: Shows the top, left, center, and right column panels; collapses the detail border.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ResetProviderMeetingDetailUi
member.summary: Resets the provider meeting detail panel visibility to its default state.
member.remarks: Shows the top and participant names panels; collapses the detail border.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.SetAdminModeTheme
member.summary: Applies the admin mode visual theme to the main window.
member.remarks: Sets the window border to purple and appends '- ADMIN MODE' to the window title.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.SetOutOfDateDatabaseTheme
member.summary: Applies the out-of-date database visual theme to the main window.
member.remarks: Sets the window border to red and appends '- DATABASE IS OUT OF DATE' to the window title.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.SetPatientDetailUi(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Configures the UI layout for displaying patient details.
member.remarks: Calls before making patient-specific panels visible.
member.param: The full name of the patient to display.
The unique identifier of the patient to display.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.SetProviderDetailUi(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Configures the UI layout for displaying provider details.
member.remarks: Hides the contacts and patient meeting detail panels, which are not used for provider display.
member.param: The full name of the provider to display.
The unique identifier of the provider to display.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.SetUserDetail(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Populates the user type, name, and ID labels in the detail panel.
member.remarks: Used by both and .
member.param: The user type label to display (e.g., 'PATIENT' or 'PROVIDER').
The name of the user to display.
The unique identifier of the user to display.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.SetSearchToggleUi
member.summary: Toggles the search type button between patient and provider search, then clears the UI.
member.remarks: Calls after toggling to reset the search state.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ClearUi
member.summary: Clears the search box and results list, then resets all UI components.
member.remarks: Calls as part of the clear operation.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.UpdateDetailsButtonColor(System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Windows.Controls.Button)
member.summary: Sets the color and enabled state of a message detail button based on failure and delivery data.

list.item: Yellow — both failures and deliveries exist.
Green — deliveries exist with no failures.
Red — failures exist with no deliveries.
Gray — no records exist; the button is also disabled.

member.param: Whether the patient has message failure records for this contact.
Whether the patient has message delivery records for this contact.
The button whose color and enabled state will be updated.

member.name: F:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow._tmDb
member.summary: The Transmorger database.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.#ctor
member.summary: Entry method for Tingen Transmorger.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.StopApp(System.String)
member.summary: Stop the application.
member.remarks:
If you pass a message to , it will be displayed to the user in a MessageBox before the application exits.
This method is public because it is called from other methods outside the class.
member.param: Optional exit message to display.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.StartApp
member.summary: Start the application.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow
member.summary: Represents a single meeting record sourced from a TeleHealth Visit Details report.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.MeetingId
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for the meeting.
member.value: A string containing the meeting ID, or if not set.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.ScheduledStart
member.summary: Gets or sets the scheduled start time of the meeting.
member.value: A string representation of the scheduled start time, or if not set.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.ActualStart
member.summary: Gets or sets the actual start time of the meeting.
member.value: A string representation of the actual start time, or if not set.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.ScheduledEnd
member.summary: Gets or sets the scheduled end time of the meeting.
member.value: A string representation of the scheduled end time, or if not set.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.ActualEnd
member.summary: Gets or sets the actual end time of the meeting.
member.value: A string representation of the actual end time, or if not set.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.Arrived
member.summary: Gets or sets the time at which the participant arrived.
member.value: A string representation of the arrival time, or if not set.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.Dropped
member.summary: Gets or sets the time at which the participant dropped from the meeting.
member.value: A string representation of the drop time, or if not set.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.Duration
member.summary: Gets or sets the duration of the meeting.
member.value: A string representation of the meeting duration, or if not set.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.Status
member.summary: Gets or sets the status of the meeting.
member.value: A string describing the meeting status, or if not set.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.HasError
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the meeting has an associated error.
member.value: if the meeting has an error; otherwise, .

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.IsCancelled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the meeting was cancelled.
member.value: if the meeting was cancelled; otherwise, .

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.IsCompleted
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the meeting was completed.
member.value: if the meeting was completed; otherwise, .

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ProcessWorkbook
member.summary: Provides methods for processing TeleHealth report Excel workbooks into JSON output files.

member.name: F:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ProcessWorkbook.ExcelConfig
member.summary: Excel dataset configuration that treats the first row of each sheet as a header row.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ProcessWorkbook.MessageDelivery(System.String,System.String,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Processes Message Delivery Excel workbooks, writing a flat JSON report of delivery statistics.
member.param: Directory containing source Excel files.
Temporary data directory for JSON output.
Optional callback to report progress messages.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ProcessWorkbook.MessageFailure(System.String,System.String,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Processes Message Failure Excel workbooks, writing summary, SMS statistics, and email statistics JSON reports.
member.param: Directory containing source Excel files.
Temporary data directory for JSON output.
Optional callback to report progress messages.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ProcessWorkbook.VisitDetails(System.String,System.String,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Processes Visit Details Excel workbooks, writing meeting details and participant details JSON reports.
member.param: Directory containing source Excel files.
Temporary data directory for JSON output.
Optional callback to report progress messages.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ProcessWorkbook.VisitStats(System.String,System.String,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Processes Visit Statistics Excel workbooks, writing summary and meeting errors JSON reports.
member.param: Directory containing source Excel files.
Temporary data directory for JSON output.
Optional callback to report progress messages.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ProcessWorkbook.Process(System.String,System.String,System.Action{System.Data.DataTable,System.String},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Processes all Excel files in a directory that match a given pattern, invoking a handler for each worksheet.
member.remarks: Temporary Excel lock files (those whose names begin with ~$) are automatically skipped.
member.param: Directory to search for Excel files.
Glob pattern used to filter files (e.g., *Visit_Stats*.xlsx).
Callback invoked for each worksheet and its sheet name.
Optional callback to report per-file progress messages.

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ProcessWorksheet
member.summary: Provides methods for processing individual worksheets from TeleHealth report workbooks.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ProcessWorksheet.Summary(System.Data.DataTable,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Double},System.Nullable{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String}}@)
member.summary: Processes a summary-style worksheet, accumulating key-value metric pairs into a dictionary.

remarks.para: Expects a two-column where the first column contains metric names and the second contains numeric values. Rows with a null or empty metric key are skipped.
If is null, it is initialized from the table's column names, falling back to Metric and Value if names are unavailable.
Duplicate metric keys are summed rather than overwritten.

member.param: Source containing at least two columns.
Dictionary accumulating metric name/value pairs across one or more worksheets.
Column header tuple (metricColumn, valueColumn); initialized from on the first call if null.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ProcessWorksheet.Keyed(System.Data.DataTable,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Processes a keyed worksheet, building a dictionary of row data indexed by a specified key column.

remarks.para: If is true, numeric values in duplicate-key rows are summed into the existing entry via ; otherwise, only the first occurrence of each key is retained.
Rows with a null or empty key value are skipped.

member.param: Source containing the report data.
Dictionary to populate with row data keyed by values.
Ordered list of column headers to include; updated with any new columns from .
Name of the column whose value is used as the row key.
When true, numeric values for duplicate keys are summed; when false, duplicate keys are ignored.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ProcessWorksheet.SimpleKeyed(System.Data.DataTable,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}},System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Processes a keyed worksheet, retaining only the first row encountered for each unique key value.

remarks.para: Unlike , this method uses a for header tracking and does not aggregate numeric values — duplicate keys are silently ignored.
Rows with a null or empty key value are skipped.

member.param: Source containing the report data.
Dictionary to populate with row data keyed by values.
Set of column headers; updated with any new columns from .
Name of the column whose value is used as the row key.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ProcessWorksheet.ClientStats(System.Data.DataTable,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}}},System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String})
member.summary: Processes a worksheet containing per-client statistics, grouping rows by client name.

remarks.para: Requires a column named Client Name; the method returns without processing if that column is absent from .
Each row is appended to the list associated with its client name in . A new list is created automatically for first-seen client names.

member.param: Source that must contain a Client Name column.
Dictionary mapping client names to their accumulated list of row records.
Set of column headers; updated with any new columns from .

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ProcessWorksheet.Flat(System.Data.DataTable,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}},System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String})
member.summary: Processes a worksheet into a flat list of row dictionaries, null-filling any missing headers.

remarks.para: All column names from are added to , enabling a consistent column set to be maintained across multiple worksheets.
For each row, columns present in the table are populated with their values; any headers in not found in the current table are set to null.

member.param: Source containing the report data.
List to which all processed row dictionaries are appended.
Set of all column headers encountered across worksheets; updated with columns from .

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportProcessor
member.summary: Provides methods for processing TeleHealth report workbooks.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportProcessor.ProcessVisitStats(System.String,System.String,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Processes Visit Statistics reports with progress callback support.
member.param: Directory containing source Excel files.
Temporary data directory.
Optional callback to report status messages.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportProcessor.ProcessVisitDetails(System.String,System.String,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Processes Visit Details reports with progress callback support.
member.param: Directory containing source Excel files.
Temporary data directory.
Optional callback to report status messages.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportProcessor.ProcessMessageFailure(System.String,System.String,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Processes Visit Details reports with progress callback support.
member.param: Directory containing source Excel files.
Temporary data directory.
Optional callback to report status messages.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportProcessor.ProcessMessageDelivery(System.String,System.String,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Processes Message Delivery reports with progress callback support.
member.param: Directory containing source Excel files.
Temporary data directory.
Optional callback to report status messages.

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility
member.summary: Provides utility methods for building, normalizing, and writing JSON report output files.
member.remarks:
This class centralizes shared logic used across TeleHealth report generation, including:
Writing flat, keyed, summary, and client-grouped JSON files.
De-duplicating records before serialization.
Normalizing phone number values in record dictionaries.
Building and merging row dictionaries sourced from instances.
Parsing object values as with culture and quote-trimming fallbacks.
All members are and ; this class is not intended for instantiation or external use.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.WriteSummaryJson(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Double},System.Nullable{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String}})
member.summary: Writes summary details.
member.remarks:
This is specifically designed for the following workbook/worksheets:
Visit_Stats/Summary
Message_Failure/Summary
These worksheets consist of key-value pairs, where keys are metric names and values are their corresponding double values. The headers parameter allows for custom column names in the output JSON, but if not provided, it will default to "Metric" and "Value". The method transforms the dictionary into a list of records suitable for JSON serialization, ensuring that the output is structured as an array of objects with consistent formatting.
member.param: Target output directory.
Target output file name.
Dictionary of metric names and their corresponding double values.
Tuple containing the column header names for the metric key and value columns.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.WriteKeyedJson(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}})
member.summary: Writes dictionary-keyed data as a flat JSON array.
member.remarks: Extracts the values from the provided dictionary and writes them as a JSON array, discarding the outer string keys. This is useful when the dictionary keys are used only for internal lookup and the output should be a flat list of records.
member.param: Target output directory.
Target output file name.
Dictionary of keyed records whose values will be written as a JSON array.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.WriteClientStatsJson(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}}})
member.summary: Groups client statistics by client name and writes the result as a nested JSON file.
member.remarks: Transforms a flat dictionary of client-keyed record lists into a structured JSON output where each entry contains a Client Name field and a nested Records array. The Client Name field is removed from each individual record to avoid redundancy, since it is already present at the top level. Duplicate records within each client's record list are removed before serialization via .
member.param: Target output directory.
Target output file name.
Dictionary mapping each client name to a list of records for that client.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.WriteFlatJson(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}})
member.summary: Writes a de-duplicated list of records as a flat JSON array.
member.remarks: Removes exact duplicate records before writing by delegating to , then serializes the result as a flat JSON array via . Use this method when the input may contain duplicate entries that should not appear in the output file.
member.param: Target output directory.
Target output file name.
List of records to de-duplicate and write as a JSON array.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.WriteJson(System.String,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Serializes data to a formatted JSON file at the specified path.
member.remarks: Phone number fields within the data are normalized before serialization via , ensuring consistent formatting in the output file. The JSON output is written with indentation enabled and encoded as UTF-8.
member.param: Target output directory.
Target output file name.
Data object to serialize; may be a flat list, dictionary, or nested structure.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.NormalizePhoneNumbersInData(System.Object)
member.summary: Normalizes phone numbers in the provided data object.
member.remarks:
Handles two data shapes:
A of records — each dictionary is normalized individually via .
A single — normalized directly via .
If the data does not match either of these shapes, it is returned unchanged.
member.param: Data object to normalize; may be a flat list of records or a single record dictionary.
member.returns: The normalized data object with phone number fields formatted consistently. If the input type is not recognized, the original object is returned unmodified.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.NormalizePhoneNumbersInDictionary(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Normalizes phone number fields within a single record dictionary.
member.remarks:
Iterates over each key-value pair in the dictionary and applies normalization according to the following rules:
If the value is a nested of records (e.g., a Records array in SMS Stats), each nested dictionary is recursively normalized via this method.
If the key matches Error Message (case-insensitive), the value is preserved as-is to retain full error text, including opt-out messages that may contain phone-number-like strings.
If the key is identified as a phone number field by , the value is normalized via .
If the value is a non-empty string that resembles a phone number as determined by , it is also normalized via .
All other values are copied to the result dictionary unchanged.
member.param: Record dictionary whose phone number fields will be normalized.
member.returns: A new dictionary with the same keys as the input, where phone number values have been normalized to a consistent 10-digit format and all other values are preserved as-is.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.IsPhoneNumberField(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether a field name is likely to contain a phone number.
member.remarks:
Performs a case-insensitive substring match against common phone number field name patterns, including:
phone
mobile
cell
telephone
tel
number
to
from
recipient
This method is used in conjunction with to identify values that should be normalized via .
member.param: Field name to evaluate.
member.returns: if the field name contains a recognized phone number keyword; otherwise, .

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.LooksLikePhoneNumber(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether a string value resembles a formatted phone number.
member.remarks:
Applies the following heuristics to evaluate the value:
The value must be at least 10 characters long and non-whitespace.
The value must contain between 10 and 11 digit characters.
The value must contain at least one common phone number formatting character: -, (, ), +, a space, or .
This method is used in conjunction with to identify values that should be normalized via . Unlike , which evaluates the field name, this method evaluates the field value itself.
member.param: String value to evaluate.
member.returns: if the value contains 10–11 digits and at least one recognized phone number formatting character; otherwise, .

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.UpdateHeaders(System.Data.DataTable,System.Collections.Generic.ICollection{System.String})
member.summary: Extracts column names from a and adds them to the header collection.
member.remarks:
Iterates over each column in the provided and performs two operations:
Adds the column name to the returned , which uses for case-insensitive membership checks.
Adds the column name to the shared collection, with behavior that depends on the runtime type of the collection:
If is a , the column name is added directly (the set handles deduplication internally).
If is a , the column name is only added if it is not already present, preventing duplicates.
A column name is treated as an empty string.
member.param: Source whose columns will be enumerated.
Shared header collection to populate; supports both and implementations of .
member.returns: A case-insensitive containing all column names found in .

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.BuildRow(System.Data.DataTable,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Builds an empty row dictionary pre-allocated to the number of headers.
member.remarks: Creates a new with an initial capacity equal to the number of entries in , avoiding internal resizing when fields are subsequently populated. The returned dictionary contains no entries and is intended to be filled by the caller.
member.param: Source associated with the row being built.
List of column header names used to determine the initial capacity of the dictionary.
member.returns: An empty with a capacity equal to headers.Count, ready to be populated with field values.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.MergeRows(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.String)
member.summary: Merges fields from a new row into an existing row, accumulating numeric values.
member.remarks:
Iterates over each field in and merges it into according to the following rules:
The field identified by is skipped, as it serves as the merge key and should not be overwritten or accumulated.
If both the existing value and the new value can be parsed as doubles via , their values are summed and stored back into .
If the new value is non- and no existing value is present for the field, the new value is copied into as-is.
All other field combinations are left unchanged in .
This method modifies in place and does not return a value.
member.param: The target row dictionary to merge values into; modified in place.
The source row dictionary whose fields will be merged into .
The name of the key column to skip during merging; comparison is case-insensitive.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.ParseDoubleValue(System.Object)
member.summary: Parses an object value as a double, with fallback quote-trimming on failure.
member.remarks:
Attempts to convert the provided value to a double using the following strategy:
If is , returns 0 immediately.
Converts the value to its string representation and attempts to parse it using and .
If the initial parse fails, surrounding quotation marks are trimmed from the string and parsing is attempted a second time under the same culture settings. This handles values that may have been serialized with enclosing quotes (e.g., "3.14").
If both attempts fail, returns 0.
To also determine whether parsing succeeded, use instead.
member.param: Value to parse; may be a string, boxed numeric type, or .
member.returns: The parsed value if successful; otherwise, 0.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.TryParseDouble(System.Object,System.Double@)
member.summary: Attempts to parse an object value as a double, trying invariant culture before reverting to current culture.
member.remarks:
Attempts to convert the provided value to a double using the following strategy:
If is , sets to 0 and returns immediately.
Converts the value to its string representation; if the result is or empty, returns .
Attempts to parse the string using and . If that fails, a second attempt is made using to accommodate locale-specific numeric formats.
Unlike , this method uses a standard TryParse pattern — it returns a boolean indicating success or failure rather than silently returning 0 on failure.
member.param: Value to parse; may be a string, boxed numeric type, or .
When this method returns , contains the parsed value; otherwise, contains 0.
member.returns: if was successfully parsed as a ; otherwise, .

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.DeduplicateRecords(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}})
member.summary: Removes exact duplicate records from a list by comparing their serialized JSON representations.
member.remarks: Iterates over each record in and serializes it to a JSON string via . A of these serialized strings is used to detect duplicates — only the first occurrence of each unique JSON representation is retained. Records are considered duplicates if their full key-value content is identical; field ordering within each dictionary may affect comparison results.
member.param: List of records to evaluate for duplicates; the original list is not modified.
member.returns: A new containing only the first occurrence of each unique record, preserving the original order of non-duplicate entries.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.NormalizePhoneNumber(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a phone number string to a consistent 10-digit format.
member.remarks:
Applies the following normalization rules in order:
If is or whitespace, it is returned as-is, substituting an empty string for .
All non-digit characters are stripped from the input string.
If the resulting digit string is 11 characters long and begins with 1, the leading digit is removed to strip the US country code.
If the resulting digit string is exactly 10 characters, it is returned as the normalized value; otherwise, the original input is returned unchanged to avoid corrupting unrecognized formats.
member.param: Phone number string to normalize; may be .
member.returns: A 10-digit string if normalization succeeds; the original if the digit count does not equal 10 after stripping; or an empty string if the input is .
